personalsummary: My name is Charles Njogu Kabui, a 23 years old Kenyan, currently living in Kisii, western Kenya. I am careful, imaginative, keen to details, and I genuinely enjoy applying diplomacy, and logic in everything I do. I love writing programs and seeing them work. If I were not a software developer, I would be a Photographer, because I love nature; or a Philosopher, because I like rationality. Am a Software Engineer by profession, mostly inclined to all possibilities of web development, and computer vision, with C#. Most of my experimental source-codes are visible for free at http://github.com/mckabue. I am currently in search for an inspiring, career building, and self-advancement internship, or job.
skillsabilities: Basic, intermediate and advanced understanding of how to work with computers, and computer systems
Basic experience with cloud hosting… (azure and appharbor )
Perfect in JavaScript, and some surrounding frameworks
Master in C# (Both desktop and for web)
Proficient in JavaScript, and some surrounding frameworks
